prompt: NGRVNG engrave, A laid-out specimen plate of the three raw ingredients that make Xiao Long Bao: a small mound of fine white wheat flour, a portion of fresh ground pork showing its texture, and a small bundle of scallion stalks and ginger root with skin partially peeled; the three items arranged side by side like botanical specimens on the same plate. Rendered as a 1890s botanical specimen plate by Pierre-Joseph Redouté. hand-drawn ink line engraving with minimal watercolor wash. cream-colored aged paper, muted ochre / sepia / olive green tones. Three raw ingredients laid out in a horizontal specimen row on the page, each rendered as its own discrete object, no overlapping; ample negative space between items. no text, no labels, no typography, no captions, no annotations.
substitution_note: Botanica LoRA omitted: Civitai download endpoint returns 401 without API token. Single Engrave LoRA covers the engraving anchor; Redoute/botanical style relies on prompt.
